General.Name: Calibre
General.Description: Winamp Group SA is involved in the digital music business in Belgium, the rest of Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company offers Winamp, an audio player; Bridger, a copyright management solution for artists; and a range of digital and music radios comprising various themed stations. It also provides solutions to artists for their music promotion, distribution, and licensing. The company was formerly known as Llama Group SA and changed its name to Winamp Group SA in October 2025. Winamp Group SA was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

0.Name: Mr. Alexandre  Saboundjian
